name: Matching Maximize Solution Public Company Limited
summary: Matching Maximize Solution Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in television (TV) content production and other related businesses. It produces TV programs and broadcast them on the airtime slots bought from the TV channel, as well as sells commercial timeslots to advertising agencies or product owners; and offers TV content production services. The company also provides rental equipment for filming, shooting, and producing TV dramas and commercials, as well as supplies skillful personnel for using such equipment; and studio rental and services for film and commercial production crew, TV program producers, and event organizers. In addition, it offers post production services for various films, various media, and related business; and produces and distributes magazines. The company was formerly known as Matching Studio Public Company Limited and changed its name to Matching Maximize Solution Public Company Limited in May 2010. The company was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand. Matching Maximize Solution Public Company Limited is a subsidiary of The BBTV Productions Co., Ltd.
